---
title: "Posts"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, description, date]
---

::: {.page-intro}
Course writing, statistical walkthroughs, and polished analysis posts from MGTA 495. Each piece is meant to read like a finished article, not just a homework submission.
:::
